reasoning: Shantanu is still Matua, still from my community, even if he broke his promise on CAA. Biswajit Das is a defector, not even from our people—why should I trust him? TMC is corruption, Left and Congress don't touch us here in Bangaon. I have waited five years, seen 14 certificates when thousands are waiting, my daughter has no work, but voting for Das or anyone else won't change that either. I will vote, but I am not fooled anymore.
primary_drivers: Shantanu Thakur remains a Matua face despite failed CAA delivery
Rejection of Biswajit Das as a defector and non-Matua alternative
Absence of credible alternatives in the community's political landscape
